data.name: One Week Away
data.detailed_description:
A last-minute vacation. A lonely partner. A week where every boundary is tested.

When your landlord cancels a long-awaited getaway at the last second, you make a spur-of-the-moment decision to take his place. Accompanying his beautiful, mature partner on a week-long escape, you find yourself caught between loyalty to the man who took you in and the raw, undeniable chemistry you share with the woman he’s neglected.

She’s been taken for granted for too long, and beneath her composed exterior is a hunger for the attention she’s been denied. Away from the prying eyes of your everyday life, the sun-drenched days and intimate hotel nights create a space where rules blur and inhibitions melt away.

Two Distinct Paths:

"One Week Away" features a dynamic stat system that tracks your personality. Your choices don't just change the

ending; they change how she reacts to you and the dialogue you encounter:

* The Loving Path (Gentleman): Focus on emotional connection, mutual respect, and romantic passion. Earn her trust

and become the romantic sanctuary she’s been missing.

* The Corruption Path (Dominant): Lean into the forbidden thrill. Take risks, assert your control, and explore her

deepest hidden desires as you push the boundaries of her surrender.

Will you be the one who finally gives her the attention she craves? The choice is yours. Make this a vacation neither

of you will ever forget.

data.short_description: Step in for the Landlord on a forbidden week-long getaway. Explore a tropical paradise with his neglected partner in this choice-driven adult visual novel. Will you be her romantic sanctuary or her deepest corruption? Every choice shapes your path through this intense secret affair.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 土耳其文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 簡體中文, 法文, 韓文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.10+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
